sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n82073" key="perisarkismo/s" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">περισαρκ-ισμός</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ὁ</gen>, <sense id="n82073.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">incision all round</tr_>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0671.tlg001:7:5" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Philum.</author> <title_ TEIform="title">Ven.</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">7.5</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
